description: CompositionCream printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with a boat V-neck, small buttoned chest placket, short sleeves, has a hakoba stitch in sweetheart neck style and split sides at the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this cream printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in the hakoba design, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
